warehouseQuery.query: SELECT /*+ parallel(AMA) parallel(BAL) parallel(ACH)  	   parallel(CRH) parallel(SEG) parallel(PRB) 	   parallel(CDTL)  	   use_hash(AMA BAL ACH CRH SEG PRB CDTL) */ --          substr('$$MP_BUSDATE',1,6) PERIOD_ID,   AMA.ACCID,   AMA.ACC_NUM ACCOUNT_NUMBER,   DECODE(BAL.MONTHLY_USAGE_INSIDE || BAL.MONTHLY_USAGE_OUTSIDE,'NN',    DECODE(BAL.MONTHLY_USAGE_INFLIGHT, 'Y', 'Inflight Only', 'Not Spent'), 	  'YN', 'Spent only inside M&S', 	  'NY', 'Spent only outside M&S', 	  'YY', 'Spent in both', 		'Not Spent') ACCOUNT_MONTHLY_USAGE,   DECODE(BAL.YEARLY_USAGE_INSIDE || BAL.YEARLY_USAGE_OUTSIDE,'NN',  	 DECODE(BAL.YEARLY_USAGE_INFLIGHT, 'Y', 'Inflight Only', 'Not Spent'), 	  'YN', 'Spent only inside M&S', 	  'NY', 'Spent only outside M&S', 	  'YY', 'Spent in both', 		'Not Spent') ACCOUNT_YEARLY_USAGE,   ACH.STATUS,   ACH.BLOCK_CODE,   NVL(BAL.BT_FLAG,'N'),   CASE WHEN CRH.CURRENT_CARDSAFE_TYPE in ('1','2','3','4') THEN 'Y' WHEN NVL(CRH.CURRENT_CARDSAFE_TYPE,'0') in ('0','9') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Unknown' END CURRENT_CARDSAFE_TYPE,   NVL(BAL.CASH_FLAG,'N'),   ACH.GBP_AMT_CHARGE_OFF,   ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT,   DECODE(ACH.STATUS,'Z','Charged Off',CASE WHEN ACH.DElQ_210_DAYS > 0 THEN  '210 Days' 	  WHEN ACH.DELQ_180_DAYS > 0 THEN  '180 Days' 	  WHEN ACH.DELQ_150_DAYS > 0 THEN  '150 Days' 	  WHEN ACH.DELQ_120_DAYS > 0 THEN  '120 Days' 	  WHEN ACH.DELQ_90_DAYS > 0 THEN  '90 Days' 	  WHEN ACH.DELQ_60_DAYS > 0 THEN  '60 Days' 	  WHEN ACH.DELQ_30_DAYS > 0 THEN  '30 Days' 	  WHEN ACH.PAST_DUE > 0 THEN 'Past Due' 	  ELSE 'Current' END) CURRENT_DELINQUENCY, -- -- Begining of Good Bad flag derivation V9_0_1 - revised by SG for Linda Johnson change 20080108 --   CASE    WHEN NVL(ACH.GBP_AMT_CHARGE_OFF,0) > 0 THEN     '2' -- Bad, Account charged off -- -- Exclusion --   -- Note: The following uses the current derived Date_Last_Payment,   -- not the Date_Last_Payment at the month/week end   -- If we have to use the value at month/week end we need to enhance this    -- SQL to derive this from Card Transaction (see mapping Credit Card 5) --   WHEN NVL(BAL.DATE_OF_LAST_PAYMENT, TO_DATE('18991231','YYYYMMDD')) < ADD_MONTHS(AMA.BUSINESS_DATE, -12)      AND NVL(ACH.DATE_LAST_PURCHASE, TO_DATE('18991231','YYYYMMDD')) < ADD_MONTHS(AMA.BUSINESS_DATE, -12)      AND NVL(ACH.CURR_BALANCE, 0) <= 0 THEN     '4' -- Exclusion, inactive more than 12 months --   WHEN NVL(ACH.DATE_LAST_PURCHASE, TO_DATE('18991231','YYYYMMDD')) = TO_DATE('18991231','YYYYMMDD') THEN     '4' -- Exclusion, nilspend --   WHEN NVL(AMA.DATE_CLOSED, TO_DATE('40001231','YYYYMMDD')) < ADD_MONTHS(AMA.BUSINESS_DATE, -12) THEN     '4' -- Exclusion, Account closed more than 12 months --   WHEN ACH.BLOCK_CODE = 'L' OR ACH.ALT_BLOCK_CODE = 'L' THEN     '4' -- Exclusion, Block code lost or stolen --   WHEN ACH.BLOCK_CODE = 'K' OR ACH.ALT_BLOCK_CODE = 'K' THEN     '4' -- Exclusion, Block code Deceased -- -- Bad --   WHEN (NVL(ACH.DELQ_60_DAYS,0) +  NVL(ACH.DELQ_90_DAYS,0) + NVL(ACH.DELQ_120_DAYS,0) +         NVL(ACH.DELQ_150_DAYS,0) + NVL(ACH.DELQ_180_DAYS,0) + NVL(ACH.DELQ_210_DAYS,0)) > 0 THEN     '2' -- Bad, 60 days plus --   WHEN ACH.BLOCK_CODE IN ('F','I','U','B','N','O','G','E') OR ACH.ALT_BLOCK_CODE IN ('F','I','U','B','N','O','G','C','V','W','Z','E') THEN     '2' -- Bad, block F,I,U,B,N,O,G,E --   WHEN NVL(ACH.DELQ_30_DAYS,0) > 0      AND (ACH.BLOCK_CODE IN ('A','P','H','Y','J','R')        OR ACH.ALT_BLOCK_CODE IN ('A','P','H','Y','J','R')) THEN     '2' -- Bad, 30 days, block A,P,H,Y,J,R --   WHEN NVL(ACH.DELQ_30_DAYS,0) > 0      AND NVL(ACH.CURR_BALANCE, 0) > NVL(ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT, 0) THEN     '2' -- Bad, 30 days and over limit --   WHEN NVL(ACH.PAST_DUE,0) > 0      AND (ACH.BLOCK_CODE IN ('Y')        OR ACH.ALT_BLOCK_CODE IN ('Y')) THEN     '2' -- Bad, past due and block Y --   WHEN NVL(ACH.PAST_DUE,0) > 0      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE IS NOT NULL      AND NVL(ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT, 0) > 0      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE / ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT >= 1.2       THEN     '2' -- Bad, past due and balance div limit > 120% -- -- Intermediate --   WHEN NVL(ACH.DELQ_30_DAYS,0) > 0      AND (ACH.BLOCK_CODE IN ('S','X','D','A','V')        OR ACH.ALT_BLOCK_CODE IN ('S','X','D','A','V')) THEN     '3' -- Intermediate, 30 days and block S,X,D,A,V --   WHEN NVL(ACH.PAST_DUE,0) > 0      AND ((ACH.BLOCK_CODE IN ('A','S','H','M','P','X','R','J')      OR ACH.ALT_BLOCK_CODE IN ('A','S','H','M','P','X','R','J')))       THEN     '3' -- Intermediate, past due and block A,S,H,M,P,X,R,J --   WHEN NVL(ACH.CURR_DUE,0) >= 0       AND ACH.PAST_DUE = 0      AND ((ACH.BLOCK_CODE IN ('A','S','H','Y','R')      OR ACH.ALT_BLOCK_CODE IN ('A','S','H','Y','R')))       THEN     '3' -- Intermediate, up to date and block A,S,H,Y,R --   WHEN NVL(ACH.PAST_DUE,0) > 0      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE IS NOT NULL      AND NVL(ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT, 0) > 0      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE / ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT <=  1.2      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE / ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT > 1.01 THEN      '3' -- Intermediate, past due and balance/limit >101% but <=120% --   WHEN  NVL(ACH.CURR_DUE,0) >= 0       AND ACH.PAST_DUE = 0      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE IS NOT NULL      AND NVL(ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT, 0) > 0      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE / ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT >  1.2 THEN      '3' -- Intermediate, up to date and balance/limit >120 -- -- Good --   WHEN NVL(ACH.PAST_DUE,0) > 0      AND (ACH.BLOCK_CODE IN ('D','V')        OR ACH.ALT_BLOCK_CODE IN ('D','V')) THEN     '1' -- Good, past due and block D --   WHEN NVL(ACH.PAST_DUE,0) > 0      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE IS NOT NULL      AND NVL(ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT, 0) > 0      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE / ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT <= 1.01 THEN     '1' -- Good, past due and balance/limit <101% --   WHEN NVL(ACH.CURR_DUE,0) >= 0       AND ACH.PAST_DUE = 0      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE IS NOT NULL      AND NVL(ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT, 0) > 0      AND ACH.CURR_BALANCE / ACH.ACCOUNT_CREDIT_LIMIT <= 1.2 THEN     '1' -- Good, up to date and balance/limit <=120% --   ELSE     '1'   END GOOD_BAD_FLAG, --   ACH.TOTAL_NUMBER_OF_CARDS,   NVL(BAL.INFLIGHT_FLAG,'N'),   ACH.LOYALTY_POINTS_BALANCE, --   NVL(NO_CASH_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS,0) LAST_30_DAYS_CASH_COUNT,   NVL(NO_CASH_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS,0) LAST_90_DAYS_CASH_COUNT,   NVL(NO_CASH_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS,0) LAST_180_DAYS_CASH_COUNT,   NVL(NO_CASH_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS,0) LAST_365_DAYS_CASH_COUNT,   NVL(VAL_CASH_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS,0) LAST_30_DAYS_CASH_VALUE,   NVL(VAL_CASH_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS,0) LAST_90_DAYS_CASH_VALUE,   NVL(VAL_CASH_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS,0) LAST_180_DAYS_CASH_VALUE,   NVL(VAL_CASH_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS,0) LAST_365_DAYS_CASH_VALUE, --   NVL(NO_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS,0) LAST_30_DAYS_RET_INF_COUNT,   NVL(NO_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS,0) LAST_90_DAYS_RET_INF_COUNT,   NVL(NO_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS,0) LAST_180_DAYS_RET_INF_COUNT,   NVL(NO_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS,0) LAST_365_DAYS_RET_INF_COUNT,   NVL(VAL_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS,0) LAST_30_DAYS_RET_INF_VALUE,   NVL(VAL_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS,0) LAST_90_DAYS_RET_INF_VALUE,   NVL(VAL_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS,0) LAST_180_DAYS_RET_INF_VALUE,   NVL(VAL_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS,0) LAST_365_DAYS_RET_INF_VALUE, --   NVL(BAL.RETAIL_FLAG,'N'), --   NVL(NO_BT_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS,0) LAST_30_DAYS_BT_TFR_COUNT,   NVL(NO_BT_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS,0) LAST_90_DAYS_BAL_TFR_COUNT,   NVL(NO_BT_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS,0) LAST_180_DAYS_BAL_TFR_COUNT,   NVL(NO_BT_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS,0) LAST_365_DAYS_BAL_TFR_COUNT,   NVL(VAL_BT_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS,0) LAST_30_DAYS_BAL_TFR_VALUE,   NVL(VAL_BT_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS,0) LAST_90_DAYS_BAL_TFR_VALUE,   NVL(VAL_BT_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS,0) LAST_180_DAYS_BAL_TFR_VALUE,   NVL(VAL_BT_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS,0) LAST_365_DAYS_BAL_TFR_VALUE, --   ACH.CURR_BALANCE,   ACH.DATE_CREDIT_LIMIT,   ACH.PAYMENT_METHOD,   CRH.DUE_LAST_STMT,   ACH.INSURANCE_STATUS,    ACH.PREVIOUS_CREDIT_LIMIT,   NVL(BAL.SCHEME_ACTIVE,'N'),   ACH.CHARGE_OFF_DATE,   NVL(CDTL.ACCOUNT_ACTIVATED,'N'),   ACH.INS_IND,   SEG.SEGMENT,   BAL.DATE_OF_LAST_CRDCRD_PURCH,   ACH.CHARGE_OFF_REASON_1,   ACH.CHARGE_OFF_REASON_2,   PRB.SCORE_1,   CRP.TOT_BEGINNING_BALANCE, --     CASE WHEN AMA.CC_MIGRATION_DATE IS NOT NULL      THEN 'Migrated' --     WHEN AMA.CC_MIGRATION_DATE IS NULL     AND AMA.SC_STATUS IN ('0','1','2','3','4','5')     THEN 'Existing Storecard Customer' --   WHEN AMA.AUTHORISED_USER = 'Y'     THEN 'Existing Storecard Customer' --   WHEN AMA.CC_MIGRATION_DATE IS NULL     AND AMA.SC_STATUS IN ('4','5','8','9')     AND NVL(AMA.SC_DATE_CLOSED,TO_DATE('18990131','YYYYMMDD')) > TO_DATE('20021028','YYYYMMDD')     THEN 'Existing Storecard Customer' --   ELSE 'Real New' END NEW_SELF_MIG_IND, --   CRH.NUM_CARDS, --   ACH.CREDIT_LIMIT_CASH,   ACH.past_due+ACH.delq_30_days+ACH.delq_60_days+   ACH.delq_90_days+ACH.delq_120_days+ACH.delq_150_days+   ACH.delq_180_days+ACH.delq_210_days ARREARS_VALUE,   CRP.CURRENT_BALANCE_BT,   CRP.CURRENT_BALANCE_CASH,   CRP.CURRENT_BALANCE_RETAIL,   ACH.ALT_BLOCK_CODE BLOCK_CODE_2,   CASE    WHEN DD_PAYMENT_FLAG IN ('N','0') OR LENGTH(LTRIM(RTRIM(DD_PAYMENT_FLAG))) = 0 OR DD_PAYMENT_FLAG IS NULL   THEN 'Not a DD payment'   WHEN DD_PAYMENT_FLAG = 'M'    THEN 'Min balance DD'   WHEN DD_PAYMENT_FLAG = 'B'   THEN 'Full payer DD'   WHEN DD_PAYMENT_FLAG = 'F'   THEN 'Customer initiated fixed DD'   WHEN DD_PAYMENT_FLAG = 'X'   THEN 'Collection initiated fixed DD'   ELSE 'Unknown'   END as DD_PAYMENT_FLAG,   --    CRH.EMPLOYEE_CODE,    CRH.PAYROLL_NO,    ACH.STMT_FLAG,    ACH.USER_CODE_9,   --    ACH.ACHOLDER_NOMINATED_AMOUNT FROM   (SELECT      ACCID,     MAX(CASE WHEN (ACTIVATION_REQ = 'N' AND CURR_PREV_IND = '1')  	    THEN 'Y' 	 WHEN (ACTIVATION_REQ = 'Y' AND ACTIVATION_RQD_PREV = 'N' AND CURR_PREV_IND = '1' AND 	       PRIOR_CARD_EXPIRY > TO_DATE('$$MP_BUSDATE','YYYYMMDD')) 	    THEN 'Y' 	 ELSE 'N'      END) ACCOUNT_ACTIVATED      FROM CARD_DETAIL CDT      WHERE TO_DATE('$$MP_BUSDATE','YYYYMMDD') between CDT.EFROM AND NVL(CDT.ETO,TO_DATE('01014000','DDMMYYYY'))      GROUP BY ACCID) CDTL,   (   SELECT ACCID, 	 SCORE_1   FROM   (SELECT PB1.ACCID, 	  PB1.SCORE_1, 	  RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY PB1.ACCID ORDER BY PB1.RUN_DATE DESC) RNK      FROM TRIAD_SCORE PB1      WHERE MONTHID = TO_CHAR(SUBSTR('$$MP_BUSDATE',1,6)))      WHERE RNK = 1        ) PRB, --   (   SELECT /*+ parallel(PLN) */       PLN.ACCID,       SUM(DECODE(PLN.PLAN_TYPE, 'C', PLN.CURRENT_BALANCE, 0)) CURRENT_BALANCE_CASH,       SUM(DECODE(PLN.PLAN_TYPE, 'R', PLN.CURRENT_BALANCE, 0)) CURRENT_BALANCE_RETAIL,       SUM(DECODE(PLN.PLAN_TYPE, 'B', PLN.CURRENT_BALANCE,                                 'T', PLN.CURRENT_BALANCE, 0)) CURRENT_BALANCE_BT,       SUM(PLN.BEGINNING_BALANCE) TOT_BEGINNING_BALANCE     FROM CREDIT_PLAN_BALANCE partition(hot) PLN     WHERE TO_DATE('$$MP_BUSDATE','YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN PLN.EFROM AND NVL(PLN.ETO,TO_DATE('40001231','YYYYMMDD'))   GROUP BY PLN.ACCID   ) CRP, --   (   SELECT /*+ parallel(SG1) */ 	 SG1.ACCID, 	 SG1.SEGMENT     FROM MRT_MONTHLY_CC_SEGMENT SG1   ) SEG, --     (SELECT ACCID, 	  SCHEME_ACTIVE, 	  MONTHLY_USAGE_INSIDE, 	  MONTHLY_USAGE_OUTSIDE, 	  MONTHLY_USAGE_INFLIGHT, 	  YEARLY_USAGE_INSIDE, 	  YEARLY_USAGE_OUTSIDE, 	  YEARLY_USAGE_INFLIGHT, 	  DATE_OF_LAST_CRDCRD_PURCH, 	  BT_FLAG, 	  CASH_FLAG, 	  INFLIGHT_FLAG, 	  RETAIL_FLAG,         DATE_OF_LAST_PAYMENT, 	  NO_BT_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS, 	  NO_BT_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS, 	  NO_BT_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS, 	  NO_BT_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS,           	  VAL_BT_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS, 	  VAL_BT_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS, 	  VAL_BT_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS, 	  VAL_BT_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS, 	  NO_CASH_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS, 	  NO_CASH_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS, 	  NO_CASH_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS, 	  NO_CASH_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS,           	  VAL_CASH_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS, 	  VAL_CASH_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS, 	  VAL_CASH_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS, 	  VAL_CASH_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS, 	  NO_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS, 	  NO_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS, 	  NO_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS, 	  NO_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS,           	  VAL_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_30_DAYS, 	  VAL_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_90_DAYS, 	  VAL_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_180_DAYS, 	  VAL_RETINF_TRANS_LAST_365_DAYS     FROM MRT_CCARD_TRANS_DERIVATIONS            ) BAL, -- -- Get data ready for derivation of the ACCOUNT_ORIGIN Attribute -- (SELECT A.CLIENTID,         A.HOUSEID,         A.ACC_NUM,         A.STATUS,         A.DATE_CLOSED,         A.ACCID,         A.MIGRATION_DATE CC_MIGRATION_DATE,         A.BUSINESS_DATE,         B.AUTHORISED_USER,         B.STATUS SC_STATUS,         B.DATE_CLOSED SC_DATE_CLOSED  FROM (SELECT AMA1.CLIENTID,          AMA1.HOUSEID,         AMA1.ACC_NUM,         AMA1.ACCID,         AMA1.MIGRATION_DATE,         AMA1.STATUS,         AMA1.DATE_CLOSED,         AMA1.BUSINESS_DATE  FROM   ALL_MONTHLY_ACCOUNTS AMA1  WHERE  AMA1.ACC_TYPE IN ('410','420','510','520')  ) A, (SELECT HLDB.CLID CLIENTID,          MAX(AMA2.ACCID) ACCID,          MAX(AMA2.MIGRATION_DATE) MIGRATION_DATE,          MIN(AMA2.STATUS) STATUS,         MAX(AMA2.DATE_CLOSED) DATE_CLOSED,         MAX(DECODE(AUT.ACCID,NULL,'N','Y')) AUTHORISED_USER  FROM ALL_MONTHLY_ACCOUNTS AMA2,  HOLDS HLDB,  AUTHORISED_USER AUT  WHERE AMA2.ACC_TYPE IN ('001','010','011','012')  AND AMA2.ACCID = HLDB.ACCID  AND AMA2.ACCID = AUT.ACCID (+)  AND HLDB.MERGE_CLID IS NULL  AND TO_DATE('$$MP_BUSDATE','YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN HLDB.EFROM AND NVL(HLDB.ETO,TO_DATE('40001231','YYYYMMDD'))  GROUP BY HLDB.CLID) B WHERE A.CLIENTID = B.CLIENTID(+)) AMA, --     ACCOUNT ACH,    CARD CRH --               WHERE AMA.ACCID    = ACH.ACCID   AND AMA.ACCID    = PRB.ACCID(+)   AND AMA.ACCID    = CRH.ACCID   AND AMA.ACCID    = BAL.ACCID(+)   AND AMA.ACCID    = SEG.ACCID(+)   AND AMA.ACCID    = CDTL.ACCID(+)   AND AMA.ACCID    = CRP.ACCID(+)
